constraints.layout_style: nested sections with h3 headings instead of labels

required_complexity_patterns.notes: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words

reference_templates.title: Mixed language attributes
reference_templates.notes: One field has lang=sv with Swedish label among English fields

reference_templates.title: Title attribute tooltip label
reference_templates.notes: Field identified primarily via title attribute on input with minimal label
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Title attribute

reference_templates.title: Input inside nested label spans
reference_templates.notes: Input nested inside label which contains multiple inline spans

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Reference DOM (Mixed language attributes): One field has lang=sv with Swedish label among English fields Reference DOM (Title attribute tooltip label): Field identified primarily via title attribute on input with minimal label Reference DOM (Input inside nested label spans): Input nested inside label which contains multiple inline spans Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: readonly-prefill, aria-labelledby-hidden, label-wraps-deep, div-role-textbox, glued-label-text. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: nested sections with h3 headings instead of labels. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Mixed language attributes; Title attribute tooltip label; Input inside nested label spans.
